documents.title: ADR-0001: Repository and V1 Disposition
documents.summary: Establishes VP-Final as the V2 repository and separates V1 wind-down.

documents.title: ADR-0002: Documentation as Code
documents.summary: Makes registry, index, link, freshness, and impact checks permanent.

documents.title: ADR-0003: 钱学森 Skills
documents.summary: Adopts the closed-loop systems-engineering workflow across all project work.

documents.title: ADR-0004: Identity and Trip Ownership Security
documents.summary: Freezes server-verified identity, exclusive Trip ownership, read-only sharing, and optimistic concurrency before public persistence.

documents.title: ADR-0005: Runtime Modes and Production Adapter Ownership
documents.summary: Freezes explicit modes, durable production ownership, truthful health, and the prohibition on silent memory fallback.

documents.title: ADR-0006: Knowledge Evidence and Index Quality
documents.summary: Freezes evidence eligibility, citations, gap minimization, and quality-gated SEO indexing.
